component.name: rsync-ui
component.summary: Configure, run and schedule rsync tasks

description.p: rsync-ui is a graphical front-end for rsync. Configure source and destination, every rsync option, include/exclude filters and SSH transport, then run tasks on demand or on a schedule. It lives in the system tray and fires scheduled tasks automatically.
Inside the Flatpak sandbox, rsync and ssh run on the host, so your real rsync binary, SSH keys and files are used.
